documents.title: Centrifugal Pump P-102 Standard Operating Procedure

maintenance_events.issue_description: High vibration detected on P-102 bearing.
maintenance_events.resolution: Replaced drive end bearing and realigned pump shaft.

maintenance_events.issue_description: V-450 fails to fully close during emergency shutdown drill.
maintenance_events.resolution: Actuator seal replaced. Calibrated stroke length.

maintenance_events.issue_description: Minor corrosion detected on exterior base of T-100.
maintenance_events.resolution: Sandblasted and applied anti-corrosive industrial coating.
